title: PMM Position Tracker: Real-time CTF Position Visibility

context.description:
## Objective
Criar módulo de tracking de posições CTF on-chain para o PMM. Deve consultar Blockscout/RPC para listar todas as ERC-1155 positions do wallet, com preço atual via CLOB API, valor em USD, e PnL. Integrar no startup do runner e no /saldo do crypto-sage.

## Context
Problema: posições CTF ficaram 'escondidas' por semanas porque o RPC polygon-rpc.com retornava dados errados. Blockscout API funciona: GET polygon.blockscout.com/api/v2/addresses/{wallet}/tokens?type=ERC-1155. Prices via: GET clob.polymarket.com/price?token_id={id}&side=sell (precisa Tor proxy). Wallet: 0xa1464EB4f86958823b0f24B3CF5Ac2b8134D6bb1. CTF contract: 0x4D97DCd97eC945f40cF65F87097ACe5EA0476045. Runner path: polymarket-mm/runner/. Crypto-sage portfolio: workspace-crypto-sage/src/connectors/portfolio.mjs.

## A
